<script lang="ts">
  import { Button } from "$lib/registry/ui/button/index.js"
  import { toast } from "svelte-sonner"

  variant="outline"
  onclick={() =>
    toast("Event has been created", {

      action: {
        label: "Undo",
        onClick: () => console.info("Undo"),
      },
    })}
>
  Show Toast
</Button>
